name: Portobello Mushrooms and Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the portobello mushrooms well, drain, dry, and cut off the stems.
2. Cut the mushrooms into thick strips and then into medium chunks.
3. In a large skillet, heat the oil over medium heat. Sauté the garlic until golden brown.
4. Add the mushrooms and sauté until well browned. Stir in the parsley, salt, and pepper.
5. Serve over hot pasta.
